Services · Film · Your Visit · Our Doctors · Technology · Membership · Contact
Restorative dentistry for the individual. Rooted in Brooklyn, designed for you — excellence, integrity, and compassion in every visit.
Building lobby entrance beside Chipotle — take the elevator to the 3rd floor and ring the doorbell. Nearest the 2·3·4·5 at Borough Hall; Citi Bike & valet right outside.
Book online in under a minute, or call and we'll find a time that works for you.
Book a Visit · Call the office
© 2026 Creative Dentistry at Brooklyn Heights · Matthew Bellafiore DDS, PC
Out-of-network · Accepting new patients · LGBTQ+ friendly
Tell us a little about you and we'll reach out within one business day to confirm. Prefer to talk? Call (718) 875-9424.
Full name · Phone · Email · What can we help with? · Preferred day · Preferred time · Anything we should know? (optional)
First time at the dentist in a while, a little nervous, etc.
Your request is in. A member of our team will reach out within one business day to confirm your visit.
Creative Dentistry at Brooklyn Heights — Restorative Dentistry for the Individual
Creative Dentistry at Brooklyn Heights — premium, relationship-driven dental care from Dr. Bellafiore, Dr. Black & Dr. Baer. Rooted in Brooklyn. Designed for you.
Rooted in Brooklyn. Designed for you.
Restorative dentistry for the individual — where precision meets personality. Comprehensive, unhurried care from a team that treats every patient like family.
Book Your Visit · Call the office
60+ Years in the neighborhood · 3 Doctors, one standard · 5.0★ Patient-rated care
"Calm, premium, & kind." — Loved by Brooklyn Heights patients
PPO+ — Out-of-network — we handle your claims
We combine advanced dentistry with genuine connection — an experience that feels personal, comfortable, and exceptionally professional. Not cookie-cutter smiles. Yours.
Advanced technology and proven techniques, delivered by doctors with decades of continuing education in implants, restoration, and full-mouth rehabilitation.
A clear list of necessary steps and honest costs. No fluff, no pressure — we co-diagnose with you and recommend only what truly serves your health.
You are welcomed, heard, and cared for like family. Personalized treatment built on trust, understanding, and a genuinely calm environment.
Some things you have to feel
Take ninety seconds and walk our halls before you ever book — the light through the windows, the quiet of the lounge, the people who'll soon know you by name.
Everything your smile needs for a lifetime of health
From preventive cleanings to complete smile transformations — thoughtfully delivered, all in Brooklyn Heights.
Comprehensive exams, professional cleanings, digital X-rays, and oral-cancer screening to keep your smile healthy for life.
Porcelain veneers, Zoom!® whitening, and composite bonding to enhance your natural beauty with artistry and balance.
Tooth-colored fillings, crowns, and bridges that restore health and function with precision — and a result that looks entirely your own.
From a single tooth to full-arch restoration — computer-guided, CBCT-planned implants for long-lasting, natural results.
Discreet ClearCorrect® and Invisalign® treatment, planned with our 3Shape Trios scanner — no messy impressions, no metal.
Relief for jaw tension and grinding with custom nightguards, splint therapy, and masseter Botox® — so you can rest at ease.
What to expect when you walk through our door
A first visit here is a 60–90 minute experience — never rushed, always personal.
You're greeted by name and offered coffee, tea, hot cider, or chilled water. We've already verified your insurance and forms, so your visit starts smoothly.
A digital wellness scan and full set of X-rays give us — and you — a clear, comprehensive view of your oral health.
Using intraoral cameras, we review what we see side by side, so you understand your health and the "why" behind every recommendation.
You leave with a transparent, long-term treatment plan and honest costs — and the confidence that it was made for you, not a quota.
You're in control here — every step of the way
Many of our patients once dreaded dental visits. We designed this practice so you can finally relax: a calm, residential space and a team that listens first.
Traditional furnishings, natural light, and personalized music in every operatory.
Nitrous oxide (laughing gas) is available, and pre-visit anti-anxiety options can be arranged.
Warm blankets and lavender-scented hot towels after treatment. Massaging chairs in select rooms.
Tell us your concerns up front — we plan around them, and you set the pace.
"Treat every patient with the same level of skill, compassion, and attention we would provide to our own family." — Our daily Standard of Care
The hands and hearts behind your care
Three doctors, one uncompromising standard — Brooklyn-rooted, relationship-driven, and endlessly committed to your long-term health.

Born and raised in Brooklyn, Dr. Bellafiore has led this practice for 30+ years. An NYU-trained implant and full-mouth rehabilitation specialist with advanced study at the Pankey Institute, Dawson Academy, and ICOI.
Implant Placement · Full-Mouth Rehab · Pankey · Dawson
Dr. Alexander Black · Restorative & Aligners · DDS
A former computer scientist turned dentist who fell in love with Brooklyn during residency. Pankey-trained, with a detail-obsessed focus on restorative dentistry, clear aligners, and TMJ relief.
Dr. Becca Baer · Restorative & Prosthodontics · DDS
Trained at Indiana University and Montefiore's renowned Centennial Clinic, where she served as Chief Resident. Brings warmth and refined skill to restorative and complex prosthodontic care.
Modern tools, in service of a gentler experience
We invest in technology for one reason: to make your care safer, more precise, and more comfortable.
Three-dimensional scans let us plan implant placement with surgical-guide precision — safer procedures and more predictable results.
Impression-free crowns and aligner cases. A quick digital scan replaces the goopy molds — more comfortable and more accurate.
Gentle laser gum therapy with minimal bleeding, less discomfort, faster healing, and a reduced risk of post-treatment infection.
Discreet, precisely-fitted aligners mapped to your bite — so straightening your smile fits seamlessly into a busy life.
"Our dental care is centered on one mission — to help each person who visits our office achieve their full potential."
We're out-of-network by design — so our recommendations answer to you, not an insurer. Here's how we make exceptional care attainable.
Most Popular · In-House Membership · For patients without insurance
Our own plan covers the care you actually need — and includes a discount on future treatment.
Two annual exams & cleanings · All necessary X-rays · One emergency exam · Discount on additional treatment
Insurance · PPO & In-Network · We handle the paperwork
Out-of-network but accepting PPO plans — we file claims for you. In-network with Delta Dental and CSEA.
PPO claims filed on your behalf · Delta Dental & CSEA in-network · Benefits verified before your visit
Financing · Flexible Payments · Care now, pay over time
Spread treatment across comfortable monthly payments with trusted financing partners — our front desk helps you apply.
Cherry financing · Sunbit financing · Quick in-office application

New to Creative Dentistry? Begin with a comprehensive exam, a full set of X-rays, and a professional cleaning — at a special new-patient rate. It's the easiest first step toward care designed entirely around you.
New Smile — Exam + Full X-Rays + Cleaning · special new-patient rate
A neighborhood practice for greater Brooklyn
Welcoming patients from across the borough and beyond.
Brooklyn Heights · Downtown Brooklyn · Cobble Hill · DUMBO · Boerum Hill · Carroll Gardens · Gowanus
Note: This page uses the same top bar, navigation, footer and booking form as every other page — those live in Page 01 · Global & Shared Elements. Below is only the copy unique to this page.
Healthy teeth, kept that way — Creative Dentistry at Brooklyn Heights
Healthy teeth, kept that way at Creative Dentistry, Brooklyn Heights — premium, relationship-driven dental care. Rooted in Brooklyn. Designed for you.
The quiet, consistent care that stops problems before they start — comprehensive exams, gentle cleanings, and early detection, all in one calm visit.
Book a Visit · Call the office
Prevention is the most powerful dentistry there is
Most of what threatens your smile — decay, gum disease, a small crack — is far easier and far gentler to address when we catch it early. That is the entire point of a regular visit here.

Every six months we take a complete look: a thorough exam, a professional cleaning, digital X-rays only when they are warranted, and an honest conversation about anything we see. No upsell, no scare tactics — just a clear picture of where you stand.
— a full evaluation of teeth, gums, bite, and soft tissue.
— gentle, thorough hygiene that removes what brushing cannot.
— low-radiation imaging, taken only when clinically useful.
— a quick, painless check at every exam.
— periodontal evaluation to keep your foundation strong.
An unhurried visit, start to finish
Coffee or tea in hand, we review any changes to your health and listen to your concerns.
Exam, imaging when needed, and a gentle cleaning from a hygienist who takes their time.
We walk through what we found together on screen — you leave knowing exactly where things stand.
Care that prevents, not just repairs
A steady rhythm of preventive visits is the single best investment you can make in your smile — it keeps small things small, and keeps you out of the chair for the big ones.
How often should I come in?
For most patients, every six months. If you are managing gum disease or other concerns, we may suggest a tailored interval.
Do you take X-rays every visit?
No. We take digital X-rays only when there is a clinical reason — and they are low-radiation when we do.
I have not been to a dentist in years. Is that a problem?
Not at all, and you will not hear a word of judgment. We simply start with a complete picture and build a plan from there.
Start with a comprehensive exam and cleaning — the easiest first step toward care designed around you.
Note: This page uses the same top bar, navigation, footer and booking form as every other page — those live in Page 01 · Global & Shared Elements. Below is only the copy unique to this page.
A smile that looks like you — Creative Dentistry at Brooklyn Heights
A smile that looks like you at Creative Dentistry, Brooklyn Heights — premium, relationship-driven dental care. Rooted in Brooklyn. Designed for you.
A smile that looks like you
Veneers, whitening, and bonding designed around your face and your personality — never a cookie-cutter set of too-white teeth.
Book a Visit · Call the office

A beautiful smile is not about a shade of white. It is about balance — teeth that suit your face, your age, and the way you talk and laugh. We design with restraint, so the result reads as you on a good day, not as work done.
We start with what you would change and what you would never want to lose. Then we plan it, often with a preview, so you can see the direction before anything becomes permanent.
— custom shells that refine shape, color, and proportion subtly.
— professional in-office brightening in a single visit.
— conservative, same-day repair of chips and gaps.
— a holistic plan built around your face and goals.
— subtle reshaping for a more harmonious look.
— see a mock-up of your future smile before you commit.
Designed with you, not for you
We learn what you want to change — and just as importantly, what you love and want to keep.
We plan the smile and, where it helps, show you a preview before any permanent work.
We fit, adjust, and perfect until it feels unmistakably like you.
Shape, proportion, and shade are chosen to suit you specifically — which is why our cosmetic work tends to get noticed as looking well-rested, not as looking done.
Not the way we design them. We choose shape and shade to suit your face — most people will only notice you look well-rested.
We guide you toward a shade that is bright but believable for your skin tone and age. The goal is natural, not neon.
It varies with diet and habits, but professional whitening lasts considerably longer than over-the-counter kits and is easy to touch up.
Book a cosmetic consultation and we will show you what is possible — honestly, and at your pace.
Note: This page uses the same top bar, navigation, footer and booking form as every other page — those live in Page 01 · Global & Shared Elements. Below is only the copy unique to this page.
Function and beauty, restored — Creative Dentistry at Brooklyn Heights
Function and beauty, restored at Creative Dentistry, Brooklyn Heights — premium, relationship-driven dental care. Rooted in Brooklyn. Designed for you.
Tooth-colored fillings, crowns, and bridges that bring back strength and health — with results that look entirely your own.
Book a Visit · Call the office

When a tooth is damaged, the goal is simple: restore it to full health and function in a way that disappears into your smile. Modern materials let us do exactly that — no metal lines, no telltale repairs.
We are conservative by philosophy. We preserve as much healthy tooth structure as possible and rebuild only what is needed, so your restoration lasts and your bite stays comfortable.
— mercury-free composite matched precisely to your tooth.
— custom crowns that rebuild strength, shape, and appearance.
— fixed replacements that close a gap and even your bite.
— conservative lab-crafted restorations for larger repairs.
— comfortable treatment that saves a natural tooth.
We pinpoint the issue with digital imaging and co-review it with you on screen.
We rebuild only what is needed, preserving healthy structure with modern materials.
We confirm everything feels natural and even before you leave.
The best restoration is the one you forget you have. We protect healthy tooth structure, match materials to your natural teeth, and obsess over a bite that simply feels right.
Will my filling or crown match my teeth?
Yes. We use tooth-colored materials shaded to blend seamlessly with your natural teeth.
How long do crowns and bridges last?
With good care, many years — often a decade or more. We will show you how to protect them.
For many cases, yes. We will discuss timing based on exactly what your tooth needs.
Bring back a tooth you can trust
Book an evaluation and we will map out the gentlest path to a strong, natural-looking result.
Note: This page uses the same top bar, navigation, footer and booking form as every other page — those live in Page 01 · Global & Shared Elements. Below is only the copy unique to this page.
A permanent answer to a missing tooth — Creative Dentistry at Brooklyn Heights
A permanent answer to a missing tooth at Creative Dentistry, Brooklyn Heights — premium, relationship-driven dental care. Rooted in Brooklyn. Designed for you.
A permanent answer to a missing tooth
From a single tooth to a full arch — computer-guided, CBCT-planned implants that look, feel, and function like your own.
Book a Visit · Call the office
The closest thing to your natural tooth
An implant replaces the whole tooth — root and crown — so you can eat, speak, and smile without a second thought. It is the closest thing modern dentistry has to giving you your natural tooth back.
Dr. Bellafiore plans every case in three dimensions with CBCT imaging and surgical guides, so placement is precise and predictable. The result is a restoration built to last for decades.
— replace one tooth without touching the healthy ones beside it.
— replace several teeth with a stable, fixed solution.
— a fixed set of teeth on a few well-placed implants.
— 3D imaging and surgical guides for precise placement.
— rebuilding support where it is needed for a strong base.
— ongoing care to keep your implants healthy for life.
A CBCT scan maps bone, nerves, and the ideal position before anything begins.
Guided, comfortable placement — many patients are surprised how easy it is.
A custom crown or bridge completes the tooth, matched to your smile.
Every implant begins as a 3D plan. CBCT imaging and surgical guides let us place each one with millimeter precision — safer for you, and far more predictable in the long run.
Most patients report far less discomfort than expected. We plan carefully and keep you comfortable throughout, with sedation available.
How long does the process take?
It varies. After placement we allow time for healing before the final crown — we will map out your timeline clearly.
Many people are, even if they have been told otherwise. A consultation and 3D scan will tell us for certain.
Replace a missing tooth for good
Book a consultation and 3D scan — we will tell you honestly whether implants are right for you.
Note: This page uses the same top bar, navigation, footer and booking form as every other page — those live in Page 01 · Global & Shared Elements. Below is only the copy unique to this page.
Straighten your smile, quietly — Creative Dentistry at Brooklyn Heights
Straighten your smile, quietly at Creative Dentistry, Brooklyn Heights — premium, relationship-driven dental care. Rooted in Brooklyn. Designed for you.
Discreet ClearCorrect® and Invisalign® treatment, planned with our 3Shape Trios scanner — no metal, no messy impressions.
Book a Visit · Call the office
The easiest path to straighter teeth

Clear aligners straighten your teeth with a series of nearly invisible trays you can take out to eat, brush, and for the occasional photo. For most adults, it is the simplest way to get the smile they have always wanted.
We map your entire treatment digitally with the Trios scanner, so you can see the plan — and often a preview of your final result — before you begin.
— comfortable, nearly invisible aligners for a discreet fix.
— the trusted aligner system, planned and managed in-house.
— a quick 3Shape Trios scan replaces goopy impressions.
— see a projection of your finished smile before you start.
— fine-tuning to get the result exactly right.
— custom retainers to protect your new smile for life.
See the plan before you start
A fast digital scan captures your teeth — no trays of putty.
We show you the step-by-step movement and your projected result.
Swap trays on schedule, with easy check-ins as your smile straightens.
You will see the plan first
Before you commit, the Trios scanner lets us show you how your teeth will move and what your finished smile should look like — so you start with confidence, not guesswork.
Many cases finish in a matter of months, though it depends on your goals. We will estimate your timeline up front.
Will anyone notice I am wearing them?
Rarely. The aligners are clear and removable — most people will not know unless you tell them.
Are aligners right for every case?
They handle a wide range, but not all. We will tell you honestly if something else would serve you better.
A straighter smile, on your terms
Book a scan and we will show you the plan and a preview of your result before you decide.
Note: This page uses the same top bar, navigation, footer and booking form as every other page — those live in Page 01 · Global & Shared Elements. Below is only the copy unique to this page.
Relief for jaw pain and clenching — Creative Dentistry at Brooklyn Heights
Relief for jaw pain and clenching at Creative Dentistry, Brooklyn Heights — premium, relationship-driven dental care. Rooted in Brooklyn. Designed for you.
Relief for jaw pain and clenching
Custom nightguards, splint therapy, and masseter Botox® to ease tension, protect your teeth, and help you rest.
Book a Visit · Call the office

Jaw pain, morning headaches, worn or sensitive teeth, a clicking jaw — these are often signs of clenching, grinding, or a strained jaw joint. The good news is that they are very treatable, usually without anything invasive.
We start by understanding what is driving it, then choose the gentlest effective approach — from a custom guard you wear at night to targeted therapy that relaxes overworked muscles.
— precisely fitted guards that protect teeth and ease tension.
— appliances that reposition and rest a strained jaw.
— targeted treatment that relaxes overworked jaw muscles.
— a close look at how your teeth meet — often the root cause.
— addressing the dental causes behind tension headaches.
— restoring teeth damaged by years of grinding.
Find the cause, relieve it gently
We evaluate your bite, muscles, and joint to understand what is really going on.
We start with the least invasive approach that will actually work.
A plan to keep symptoms from returning — and your teeth protected.
Relief should not be an ordeal. We lean on the gentlest options first — a custom guard, targeted therapy — and surround them with the warm blankets and calm that define every visit here.
Yes, when administered by a trained clinician. We use it precisely to relax specific jaw muscles, with no effect on your expression.
For most people who clench or grind, yes — it protects your teeth and often relieves morning pain and headaches.
They can be. Clenching and a strained bite are common, under-recognized causes. An evaluation will tell us.
Book an evaluation and we will find the cause of your jaw pain — and the gentlest way to relieve it.
